news.t: Tradr Set to Launch Leveraged ETFs on AXTI, CPNG, MPWR and STX

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long AXTI Daily ETF (AXTX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement of AXT, Inc. (AXTI) AXTX was launched on Apr 24, 2026 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr Set to Launch Leveraged ETFs on AXTI, CPNG, MPWR and STX
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $AXTI #ETFS--Tradr ETFs announces the launch of 2X long leveraged ETFs on AXTI, CPNG, MPWR and STX.
